title: Tired of manually managing files between items and Google Drive?

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Keep your files in sync — without lifting a finger.

If you’re storing documents, assets, or any kind of files in monday.com, you’ve probably ended up dragging things to Google Drive manually or pasting links back into your board.

We built a Google Drive Integration app that makes all of that automatic.

It connects your monday.com boards to Google Drive, so files stay organised, synced, and easy to find — no matter how fast your projects move.

What you can do with it:

  • Upload files to Drive with a button click
  • Sync files when a column changes
  • Auto-create Drive folders when items or subitems are added
  • Keep folder names updated if item names change
  • Store folder links back into a column
  • Define your own folder structure and hierarchy
  • Prevent duplicates — we only upload if the file is new
  • Files go straight from monday.com to Drive — nothing is stored on our end

Book a demo with us here
